text:
The department shall issue specialty license plates for persons who served on a submarine while in the United States Navy. The license plates must include:

(1) the words “U.S. Navy Submarine Service” in red letters at the bottom of each plate; and

(2) a depiction of the Submarine Warfare insignia on the left side of the plate.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 504.327 (Presidential Service Badge) by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 768 (H.B. 4595 ), Sec. 24.001(55), eff. September 1, 2023.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.329 — United States Navy Submarine Service

The department shall issue specialty license plates for persons who served on a submarine while in the United States Navy. The license plates must include:

    (1) the words “U.S. Navy Submarine Service” in red letters at the bottom of each plate; and

    (2) a depiction of the Submarine Warfare insignia on the left side of the plate.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 504.327 (Presidential Service Badge) by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 768 (H.B. 4595 ), Sec. 24.001(55), eff. September 1, 2023.

*Added by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 302 (S.B.791), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2021.*

the words “U.S. Navy Submarine Service” in red letters at the bottom of each plate; and
a depiction of the Submarine Warfare insignia on the left side of the plate.
Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 504.327 (Presidential Service Badge) by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 768 (H.B. 4595 ), Sec. 24.001(55), eff. September 1, 2023.
